Technology.desc: The project was part of a package of tech investment promising the UK could become an AI superpower.

Science.title: Want to help garden birds? Don't feed them in warmer months, says RSPB
Science.desc: The UK's largest bird charity has issued new guidance advising people to stop using feeders to help wildlife thrive.
